## Testing

- [ ] `flake8 analysis/` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bandit -r analysis/ tip-feed/` passes with no HIGH severity issues
- [ ] New Python modules include docstrings

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] No real attacker IP addresses committed (use `XX` for last octets in samples)
- [ ] PR targets `main` branch
